description: Translation of one anchored span of a source text. The translated text is carried inline; the harvester collects records into the referenced bkk-tr-<translationId> bundle. The Bluesky record is the live source of truth — the bundle is the curated downstream archive.

edition.description: Short edition id of the source the anchor refers to.

anchor.description: Span in the source text being translated.

translationId.description: Id of the target translation bundle (matches TranslationSummary.id; typically the bkk-tr-* bundle name).

text.description: Translation body. Format is given by `format` (currently always `markdown`).

lang.description: BCP-47 language tag of `text` (e.g. en, de, ja).

format.description: Body format. `markdown` is the only currently defined value.

title.description: Optional segment title (for structured passages where a heading is appropriate).

note.description: Optional translator's note on this segment.

supersedes.description: CID of a prior translation segment this one replaces.
